channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 17.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Six in 10 Neets have never had a job, says Alan Milburn, as he warns of ‘generational faultline’ – UK politics live
item.description: Six in 10 Neets have never had a job, says Alan Milburn, as he warns of ‘generational faultline’ – UK politics live

item.title: The Guardian: Keir Starmer - The Guardian
ConservativeHome: Laurence Fredricks: Building in Britain could have a Burnham problem
item.description: Laurence Fredricks: Building in Britain could have a Burnham problem

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: In today's newsletter: some thoughts on the state of the Labour leadership contest, AKA why I asked @jenwilliamsft.bsky.social to write every Friday (it's not just because I'm lazy!):
